name: kinocut
description: Local stdio MCP server for guarded FFmpeg video workflows.
long_description: Kinocut exposes local video editing, analysis, workflow, rescue, and repurposing tools over MCP stdio. This MCPB package is a staged local launcher: it does not bundle Python, Kinocut, FFmpeg, Node, Hyperframes, optional AI packages, or model weights. Configure an existing Python environment with Kinocut installed, keep FFmpeg available on PATH or configured by path, and install optional AI or Hyperframes dependencies only when you intend to use those capabilities.

pythonExecutable.title: Python executable
pythonExecutable.description: Optional Python command or absolute executable path for an environment with kinocut==1.9.0 installed. Leave blank to try python3 then python.

ffmpegPath.title: FFmpeg executable
ffmpegPath.description: Optional FFmpeg executable path. Leave blank when ffmpeg and ffprobe are already available on PATH.

hyperframesCommand.title: Hyperframes command
hyperframesCommand.description: Optional Hyperframes command for Hyperframes-specific tools. Leave blank to keep those tools capability-gated.
